name: pyroar-male
flavor_texts: The male with the largest mane of fire is the leader of the pride.
With fiery breath of more than 10,000 degrees Fahrenheit, they viciously threaten any challenger. The females protect the pride’s cubs.
The males are usually lazy, but when attacked by a strong foe, a male will protect its friends with no regard for its own safety.
The temperature of its breath is over 10,000 degrees Fahrenheit, but Pyroar doesn’t use it on its prey. This Pokémon prefers to eat raw meat.
text: Pyroar-male is the Royal Pokémon. It is a fire and normal-type Pokémon. Abilities: rivalry, unnerve, moxie (hidden). Base stats — HP: 86, Attack: 68, Defense: 72, Sp. Atk: 109, Sp. Def: 66, Speed: 106. Evolution line: litleo → pyroar. Lore: The male with the largest mane of fire is the leader of the pride. With fiery breath of more than 10,000 degrees Fahrenheit, they viciously threaten any challenger. The females protect the pride’s cubs. The males are usually lazy, but when attacked by a strong foe, a male will protect its friends with no regard for its own safety. The temperature of its breath is over 10,000 degrees Fahrenheit, but Pyroar doesn’t use it on its prey. This Pokémon prefers to eat raw meat.
